titleStmt.title: SII 27.55: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 55. (A.R. No. 475 of 1928-29.) UḶĀYBEṬṬU, MANGALORE TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of the Śiva temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1298, Rākshasa, Āshāḍha śu. 15, Thursday corresponding to 1375 A.D., June 14, the Śaka year being current.

It records a gift of land as dēvasva to Vidyāgiritīrtha-śrīpāda for worship and offerings in the temple at Omaṁjūru for the welfare of the king Bukkaṇṇa-voḍeya by Paṇḍaridēva who was governing Maṅgalūru-rājya. The imprecatory portion states that the person who disobeyed the gift was to be fined 1000 gadyāṇa payable to the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ sāmānyōyaṁ dharṁmasē
tuṁ nripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālēnīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvānētān
bhāvinaḥ pārththivēṁdrāṁ bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāma
caṁdra . svasti śakavaruśa 1298 neya rākṣasa saṁvatsarada
Āṣāḍha śuddha 15 guruvāradaṁdu śrīmanumahāmaṁ
ḍaḷēśvaraṁ Arirāya vibhāḍa bhāsege tapuvarāya
ra gaṁḍa śrī vīra bukkaṁṇa Oḍeyarige rājyābyudaya
vāgirabēkeṁdu maṁgalūra rājyavanāḷuva paṁḍari
dēva Oḍeyaru māḍidadharṁmma Omaṁjūra sāle
dēvālyavanu vidyāgiritīrththa śrīpādaṁgaḷige dhā
reyaneṟadu koṭu barasikoṭṭa śilāśāsana kra
maveṁteṁdare Ādēvasvavanu cenāgi rakṣisi
koṁḍu dēvara śrīkāryyavanu tappade Ā
dunaḍasikoṁḍu baharu śrīpādaṁ

gaḷige varuṣaṁ prati
bhatta mū 26 ga 3 nū koṁbaru U
ḷida bhatta modalāgi dēvasvadalu yē
nuḷḷadanū koṁḍu dēvara śrīkāryyavanū naḍa
suvaru yidharmmakke Ārobbaru vakravāgi baṁda
varuḷḷavaḍe Arasige tappu ga 1000 tali 1
ṟuva Aḍaka Arasugaḷu vakravāgi dharmake vipa
rītava māḍidaḍe vāraṇāsiyalu sāvira kavi leyavi is engraved below the line.
brāṁhaṇara koṁdapāpa dharṁmava keḍisida dōṣa I ma
riyādeyalu Omaṁjūra kaṭaḷeya salakeya vū
ravaru muṁtāgi dharṁmmavamāḍsi śilāśāsanava bara
sikoṭṭa paṁḍaridēva Oḍeyarige maṁgaḷamahā
śrī svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdha
rvaruśa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jā
sēna bōvana baraha paṁḍa
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.55 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
